name: Syndax Pharmaceuticals Inc
business: Syndax Pharmaceuticals is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing innovative cancer therapies. It has two FDA-approved medicines: Revuforj (revumenib) for relapsed/refractory acute leukemias and Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr) for chronic graft-versus-host disease. It also has a pipeline of clinical development programs.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing innovative cancer therapies.

We currently have two commercially approved medicines, Revuforj (revumenib) and Niktimvo (axatilimab-csfr), and a robust slate of clinical development programs designed to unlock the full potential of our first two products.
